Box #4—Take Something Out
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #2—Box#4 Take Something Out
*How might you improve things by removing something?
You may think that a certain component, element or step in a process is indispensable.
Maybe it’s not. Why not remove it and see what happens? I’ve seen removing a step in
a sales process or sales funnel improve results dramatically.
*What can be made better by extracting, isolating or highlighting it?
Find that little tree in the forest whose growth is stunted by the huge oaks all around it.
Transplant it into an open field and watch it thrive.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
